name: Service Account Interactive Login
description: Alert when service accounts are used for interactive logins
query:
// Service Account Interactive Login
// Service accounts should not login interactively
events from authentication
where event_type = "authentication_success"
  and account_type = "service"
  and logon_type in ("interactive", "remote_interactive")
group by username, source_ip
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
